content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The teacher asked the students to draw a ___ showing the parts of a plant cell and label each section clearly.
distractor_rationale: a conclusion is a written judgement at the end of an investigation, not a labelled visual drawing of parts
a category is a group things belong to, not a visual representation of parts
a definition explains the meaning of a word, not a labelled visual drawing

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The scientist used a microscope to look at a single ___ taken from the patient's skin to check for signs of damage.
distractor_rationale: a chemical is a substance, not a biological unit examined under a microscope from skin tissue
bacteria are living microorganisms, not the structural unit of skin tissue being examined for damage
a diagram is a drawn image, not a biological sample taken from skin

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The nurse washed her hands thoroughly to remove any ___ that might cause an infection in the patient.
distractor_rationale: cells are the building blocks of living tissue and are not removed by handwashing to prevent infection
chemicals in this context would not specifically cause an infection the way microorganisms do, and handwashing targets germs not generic substances
diagrams are drawn images and cannot be removed from hands or cause infections

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: After collecting all the data, the research team met to ___ the results and look for patterns that could explain the outcome.
distractor_rationale: calculate means to work out a number using arithmetic, not to examine data for patterns and explanations
define means to explain the meaning of a term, not to examine results for patterns
conclude means to reach a final judgement, which happens after analysis, not during the examination of results for patterns

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The measurements in the report must be ___, so the engineers checked every figure twice before submitting the final document.
distractor_rationale: chemical describes the nature of a substance, not the quality of measurements in a report
developed means created or advanced over time, which does not describe the required quality of measurements
defined means given a clear meaning, which applies to terms or concepts, not to numerical measurements in a report

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The professor asked her students to ___ the term 'hypothesis' clearly at the beginning of their written reports.
distractor_rationale: analyse means to examine something in detail, not to explain the meaning of a term in writing
calculate means to work out a numerical answer, not to explain what a word means
develop means to create or improve something over time, not to explain the meaning of a specific term

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Researchers placed each type of plant into a separate ___ based on the shape of its leaves and the structure of its roots.
distractor_rationale: a conclusion is the final judgement reached at the end of a study, not a group that things are sorted into
an analysis is the process of examining data in detail, not a group that objects are placed into based on shared features
a definition explains the meaning of a word or concept, not a group that plants are sorted into by physical features

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: By examining the rate at which the substance dissolved in water at different temperatures, the chemist was able to ___ the exact boiling point of the compound.
distractor_rationale: conclude means to reach a general judgement at the end of a study, not to establish a precise numerical value through measurement
develop means to create or improve something, not to establish an exact physical value through experimental measurement
define means to explain the meaning of a term, not to establish a precise physical property through experimental observation

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The lab team used a detailed ___ of the soil samples to identify which ___ compounds were present and at what concentration levels.
distractor_rationale: a definition explains the meaning of a word and cannot be used on soil samples to identify compounds
a diagram is a visual drawing and is not a process applied to soil samples to identify substances
a category is a classification group, not a process carried out on samples to identify chemical compounds

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: After reviewing all the experimental evidence, the team was able to ___ that the new vaccine reduced the spread of the virus by more than sixty percent.
distractor_rationale: calculate means to work out a number arithmetically, not to reach a final judgement based on reviewing experimental evidence
determine means to establish a specific fact or value through measurement or testing, not to draw an overall judgement from a body of evidence after a study is complete
develop means to create or advance something over time, not to reach a final judgement based on reviewed evidence

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The nurse used a microscope to examine the blood ___ and check for signs of infection.
distractor_rationale: chemicals are substances, not biological units examined in blood under a microscope
diagrams are drawn illustrations, not physical components found in blood
categories are classification groups, not physical structures visible under a microscope

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The scientist drew a clear ___ to show how the heart pumps blood around the body.
distractor_rationale: a conclusion is a written or spoken finding, not a visual illustration of a process
bacteria are microscopic organisms, not a visual tool used to explain a process
a definition explains the meaning of a word, not the physical process of how an organ works

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: After reviewing all the test results, the research team was able to ___ that the new medicine reduced symptoms in most patients.
distractor_rationale: calculate means to work out a number mathematically, not to reach a judgement from evidence
define means to give the meaning of a term, not to reach a finding from test results
develop means to create or build something new, not to form a judgement after reviewing results

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The food safety officer confirmed that harmful ___ were present in the samples taken from the kitchen surfaces.
distractor_rationale: cells are basic biological units of living organisms, not pathogens specifically associated with contamination of kitchen surfaces
chemicals are non-living substances, and the sentence specifies harmful organisms detected in a food safety context, not a chemical spill
categories are classification groups and cannot be physically present on a surface or cause contamination

content.instruction: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Before presenting her findings, Maria had to carefully ___ the survey data to identify patterns in how different age groups responded to the treatment.
distractor_rationale: determine means to find out a specific fact or decision, not to examine data systematically for patterns across groups
calculate means to perform a mathematical computation to reach a single numerical result, not to examine patterns across grouped survey responses
define means to state the meaning of a concept or term, not to examine and interpret collected data

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The nurse used a microscope to look at the blood ___ and check for any damage.
distractor_rationale: chemicals are substances, not biological units visible as individual structures in blood under a microscope
diagrams are drawings or charts, not physical components of blood
bacteria are microorganisms that cause infection, not the structural units of blood being examined for damage

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The teacher drew a clear ___ on the board to show how water moves through the water cycle.
distractor_rationale: a definition explains the meaning of a word, it cannot be drawn on a board to show a process
a conclusion is a final judgement reached after study, not a visual representation of a process
a category is a group or class of things, not a visual illustration of how something works

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The doctor told the patient that the infection was caused by ___ that had entered the wound.
distractor_rationale: cells are the basic units of living organisms and do not enter a wound to cause infection from outside
chemicals are non-living substances and do not independently enter wounds to cause biological infections
diagrams are visual representations and have no role in causing physical infections

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: Before the experiment began, the scientist needed to ___ the exact amount of salt required for the solution.
distractor_rationale: conclude means to reach a final judgement after investigation, which happens at the end, not before an experiment begins
define means to explain the meaning of a term, not to work out a precise numerical quantity
develop means to create or improve something over time, not to work out a specific measurement

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: After collecting all the data, the research team met to ___ the results and look for patterns.
distractor_rationale: define means to give the meaning of a word or concept, not to examine data for patterns
calculate means to work out a number mathematically, which is only one small part of examining results for patterns
conclude means to reach a final decision, which comes after analysis, not as the act of examining results

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The measurements in the report were ___, matching the actual values to within one decimal place.
distractor_rationale: chemical describes the nature of a substance, not the precision of a measurement
defined means explained or given a clear meaning, which does not describe how closely measurements match real values
developed means created or improved over time, which cannot describe the precision of a recorded measurement

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The researchers placed each plant species into a separate ___ based on the shape of its leaves.
distractor_rationale: a conclusion is a judgement reached after study, not a group that items are placed into for classification
an analysis is the process of examining something in detail, not a group used to organise species
a definition explains the meaning of a term, not a classification group that specimens are sorted into

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The laboratory report included a detailed ___ of the water sample, identifying every substance present in it.
distractor_rationale: a definition explains what a term means and cannot identify substances present in a physical sample
a conclusion is the final judgement drawn from an investigation, not the detailed examination of a sample's contents
a category is a classification group and does not describe the process of identifying all substances in a sample

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The scientists used a series of controlled tests to ___ which of the three materials conducted heat most efficiently.
distractor_rationale: define means to explain the meaning of a concept, not to find out which of several options performs best through testing
conclude means to reach a final judgement, but it follows from evidence already gathered, whereas determine describes the active process of finding out through the tests themselves
develop means to create or improve something, not to find out which material has a specific property

content.instruction: Choose the best word to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: At the start of the paper, the authors provide a clear ___ of the term 'sustainable energy' as it is used throughout their study.
distractor_rationale: a conclusion appears at the end of a study to summarise findings, not at the start to explain how a term is used
an analysis is a detailed examination of data or evidence, not an explanation of how a specific term is being used
a diagram is a visual illustration and cannot explain the meaning of a technical term in written academic text

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The scientist made a careful ___ of the water sample before writing her report. (ANALYSE)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The teacher asked the students to draw a clear ___ showing how plants absorb water. (DIAGRAM)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: After running three experiments, the research team was able to reach a firm ___ about the effect of temperature on bacterial growth. (CONCLUDE)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The lab report must include ___ measurements, so students should check their instruments twice before recording any data. (ACCURATE)

content.instruction: Use the word in brackets in the correct form to complete the sentence.
content.prompt: The ___ of a new category of heat-resistant bacteria has led researchers to reconsider existing theories about life in extreme environments. (DEVELOP)
